nasb.text: Then you shall bring Aaron and his sons to the doorway of the tent of meeting and wash them with water.

esv.text: Then you shall bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance of the tent of meeting and shall wash them with water

cnv.text: 要把亞倫和他的眾子帶到會幕的門口來，用水給他們洗身。

ccb.text: 要把亚伦父子们叫到会幕入口，用水为他们沐浴，
